description.value: You know that energy is eternal—changing, shifting, and reforming, but never truly extinguished. Just as you were born from the death of a star, so too are you born again upon your own death. If you would die, your body explodes in a miniature burst of energy, and you're reborn as a microscopic, slumbering novian, which grows to your full size (usually Tiny) over the course of 24 hours. At the end of this time, you awaken fully healed in the space you died.
